clEntries.5.11.125: v5.11.124: Fixed IR blaster Z2M protocol field sizes, resolving learning issues., Corrected SDK3 flow card methods and IR blaster sequence mismatch., Increased TZE lux clamp from 2000 to 10000 to accommodate real values (2177-2444)., None in this release., None in this release.
clEntries.5.11.124: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.124 fixes IR blaster learning issues and updates driver and fingerprint counts.
clEntries.5.11.123: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.123: Fixed IR blaster sequence mismatch and adjusted TZE lux clamp value.
clEntries.5.11.122: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.122: Fixed lux clamp issue and updated fingerprints.
clEntries.5.11.121: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.121 adds new device variants and fixes issues with LEAPMW DP109/119 distance reporting.
clEntries.5.11.120: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.120 adds new device variants and fixes distance drop issue for radar sensors.
clEntries.5.11.119: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.119 adds new device variants and updates drivers, now with .
clEntries.5.11.118: Added WiFi Camera driver (Tuya IPC) with local control and RTSP/snapshot streaming support.
clEntries.5.11.117: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.117: Restored forum integration and updated drivers and fingerprints.
clEntries.5.11.116: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.116 includes a batch state update feature for improved device management.
